titleScreen.titleScreenIntroduction: Leverage your free Academic Writer account to help you write better, faster and more accurate research papers in APA format.

params.text: Learn more about any areas in APA you may have questions about. Such as, abbreviations, abstracts and more!

params.question: What section do you go into to learn more about APA formatting?

params.text: Work through each self-paced module to learn more!

params.textField: Academic writer has a *Learn* section where you can work through self-paced modules to gain a better understanding of tricky APA formats.

params.text: Click here to add references to your Reference Center
Click here to edit your references. If there is an exclaimation point icon here, that means there is some information required for APA formatting that is missing from the reference
Select your reference to make edits
See more information about your reference at a glance. Such as if the refernce was imported, if it is referenced in a paper or any notes about the reference
Navigate your Reference Center by scrolling through the pages
Check for duplicate references using this button
Search your reference list by entering key words into the search bar
Change the organization style of your reference list by changing its order

questions: There are two sections under the Title Page. They are: *title* and *authors*

params.text: Your paper title goes here
Your course number will go here. For example, BUS 198
Your course name will go here. For example, Introduction to Business
Your professor will go here. For example, Professor Ellie Cronk or Dr. Ellie Cronk
The date you write the paper goes here
Only check this box if your professor requires a running head. This usually looks like your last name or the title of the paper by the page numer
Click on "Save" once you are done
Click "Save and move on to authors" once you are ready to go onto the next step

params.question: There are two separete boxes to fill in your Course Number and Course Name

params.text: Type in your first name
Type in your last name
Select "Institution"
Type in your school. For example, this will be: North Central University
Select "Yes"
Once your author page information is complete hit the "Add to author list" button
Once you type in your information and save it to your author list, Academic Writer saves it for you so you don't have to keep retyping it every time you write a paper.

params.question: You have to re-type your name and institution every time you write a paper

params.text: This section allows you to start writing the main paper

Click on "New Section" to add main points in your paper such as Introduction, [Main Point 1], [Main Point 2], [Main Point 3], and Conclusion. Do not add a references section as the program will do it for you.

params.question: You should add a "References" section to your paper by clicking "New Section"

params.text: Do you want to cite a reference in your paper like this example? Academic Writer will do it for you!
Place your cursor where you want your reference/quotation
Select "Find and Cite Reference"
Select the "Insert" tab
Select your citation from the pop-up that openes
Select "Cite"
Select the "?" if you need help
Select whether a reference will be a parenthetical or a narrative citation. If you don't know what that means, select the "?" for help.
Select whether or not this reference will be a quotation
Select whether or not you have used this quotation before
Select whether or not you got this from a numbered page or paragraph
Add your page number if you have one
Type in your quotation here. Do not use quotation marks here as the program will do the formatting for you.
Select "Submit" in order to add your quotation or reference to your paper

questions: It is always good practice to go to the *check* section in Academic Writer to polish your paper before submission.

params.text:
Are you done already? It's time to export. 

You can email your paper to yourself or download it. 

It's best practice to always keep your papers saved in a folder on your computer locally and backing up to a cloud service. 

North Central University does not keep every assignement you submit. It is your responssibiliy to save your assigments.

Academic Writer will also keep your documents in the software even after you no longer have an active account but do not rely on only Academic Writer to store your documents.

Select what format you want your paper in. 

(PDF is nice for its universality in uploading format and authority control. Word is nice if you will want to continue editing offline.)
Select "Download Paper" to export
If you only want a copy of your references list, select "Export Paper Reference List'
